meta.title: Bruno Getten Triches | Portfolio
meta.description: Public portfolio of Bruno Getten Triches with experience in web, mobile, games, technical leadership, and software architecture.
meta.ogDescription: Projects, experience, services, and contact channels.

hero.text: Developer and Tech Lead focused on architecture, technical leadership, refactoring, white-label platforms, web and mobile products, scalable APIs, integrations, and games.

about.title: Development focused on architecture, product, delivery, and scalability.
paragraphs: My name is Bruno Getten Triches. I work as a developer and Tech Lead with hands-on experience across web, mobile, backend, integrations, infrastructure, and end-to-end digital products.

Throughout my career, I have worked on critical system refactoring, new product creation, white-label platforms, technical documentation, team leadership, and the evolution of systems already running in production.

experienceSection.title: Professional journey
experienceSection.text: A concise view of the experiences that best represent my technical profile, leadership, and product-building background.

experience.title: Tech Lead · Sensorama Play
experience.description: Technical leadership across multiple public-sector projects, defining architecture, coding standards, technical documentation, deployment flows, and support for POCs. Hands-on work with web and mobile products, APIs, 2D/3D games, and infrastructure.

experience.title: Mid-level Developer · Amplimed
experience.description: Main technical contributor for marketplace products, including online scheduling, telemedicine, mobile apps, and service queues. Worked on marketplace refactoring, the scheduling app, and white-label microservices and solutions.

experience.title: Tech Lead · Astronfy
experience.description: Technical owner for the marketplace, affiliate dashboard, support system, and 2D/3D products. Led web and mobile structures, national and international payment integrations, crypto flows, and technical communication with clients from Europe and Asia.

experience.title: Mid-level Developer · Infogen Sistemas
experience.description: Worked on the GeneXus ERP, a .NET web portal, and mobile apps. Led React Native refactors, app publishing, deployment support, integrations, and onboarding of new developers while helping standardize the stack.

experience.title: Freelance Developer
experience.description: On-demand projects for different industries, including landing pages, intranets, mini ERPs, real-time dashboards, mobile applications, integrations, and 3D multiplayer games, with direct client and partner communication.

servicesSection.title: How I can help
servicesSection.text: Services organized around product, architecture, performance, integrations, and system evolution.

services.title: Software Architecture
services.description: Architecture definition, technical standards, responsibility boundaries, documentation, and a solid foundation for product growth.

services.title: Web Development
services.description: Creation and evolution of platforms, dashboards, admin systems, marketplaces, landing pages, and web solutions focused on performance and clean UX.

services.title: Mobile Development
services.description: Development and refactoring of Android and iOS apps focused on stability, publishing, long-term maintenance, and technical consistency.

services.title: APIs and Integrations
services.description: Integrations with payment gateways, authentication, cloud services, REST APIs, OAuth, SSO, WebSockets, and external services.

services.title: White-Label Solutions
services.description: Reusable and customizable product structures for different clients, accelerating rollout, technical consistency, and commercial expansion.

services.title: Refactoring and Scalability
services.description: Codebase reorganization, legacy system improvements, reduced rework, and structural preparation for higher demand and new modules.

projectsSection.title: Featured projects
projectsSection.text: A selection of projects and visual studies that represent my background in interfaces, digital products, implementation, accessibility, integrations, and system organization.

projects.title: Online Scheduling App
projects.description: Mobile app for online scheduling with traditional authentication, social login, conversion-oriented flow, and calendar integration, designed for scalable operation and reuse in white-label scenarios.

projects.title: Scheduling and Administration Web Panel
projects.description: Web panel for operational management of schedules, services, availability, configuration, and admin flows. Structured to centralize operations, keep app and web consistent, and support product evolution.

projects.title: Universal Accessibility SDK and Plugin
projects.description: SDK/plugin to add accessibility resources to websites, applications, and systems, with simple setup, dedicated demo, license management, and potential distribution as a reusable product.

projects.title: Offline Mobile URL Shortener
projects.description: Offline-first mobile app with local persistence, on-device history, and an experience designed for continuous use even without connectivity, prioritizing simplicity, speed, and reliability.

projects.title: Asset Compression and Conversion Website
projects.description: Web tool for asset compression and conversion, built to speed up workflows with images and static files for apps, websites, games, and publishing pipelines.

projects.title: Unity 2D Multiplayer Truco
projects.description: 2D Truco game in Unity with structure prepared for local and online multiplayer, match state management, organized expansion paths, and a fast, competitive experience.

certificatesSection.title: Certificates and continuing education
certificatesSection.text: A curated selection of the most relevant courses in backend, mobile, games, architecture and software fundamentals that reinforce my hands-on work on real products.

certificates.title: The Ultimate Guide to Video Game Optimisation
certificates.description: Course focused on game optimisation, profiling, performance and engineering practices to improve fluidity and scalability in Unity projects.

certificates.title: Build A Multiplayer Kart Racing Game - Unity 6 Compatible
certificates.description: Hands-on training on structuring a multiplayer kart racing game in Unity, covering gameplay foundations, project organisation and technical evolution.

certificates.title: Design Patterns for Game Programming - Unity 6 Compatible
certificates.description: Study of patterns applied to game programming to keep code modular, readable and easier to maintain.

certificates.title: PHP Composer: Dependencies, Autoload and Publishing
certificates.description: Course focused on dependency management, autoloading and PHP application organisation with Composer.

certificates.title: JavaScript: Browser APIs and Design Patterns
certificates.description: JavaScript training focused on browser APIs, code organisation and design patterns for web applications.

certificates.title: JavaScript: Exploring the Language
certificates.description: JavaScript language fundamentals covering syntax, logic and the base used to build interfaces and business rules.

certificates.title: React Native: Using and Creating Hooks
certificates.description: Hands-on React Native course using Hooks for component design, state, effects and reusable logic.

certificates.title: React Native: Building an App
certificates.description: Introductory course on building an app in React Native with focus on project structure and mobile flow.

certificates.title: C# Part 1: First Steps
certificates.description: C# fundamentals and first contact with the language, useful for both .NET and Unity development.

certificates.title: ASP.NET Identity Part 1: Manage User Accounts
certificates.description: Course focused on authentication and user account management with ASP.NET Identity.
